questions.prompt: Calculate the hydrogen ion concentration of a solution with pH 3.
questions.topicHint: linking pH values to powers of ten
markSchemeBullets: hydrogen ion concentration equals 10^-3 mol per dm^3
credit correct power of ten working

questions.prompt: Describe how to prepare copper sulfate crystals from copper oxide and sulfuric acid.
questions.topicHint: ordered required-practical method for soluble salts
markSchemeBullets: add excess copper oxide to sulfuric acid
filter to remove the excess solid
allow crystals to form on cooling and dry them

questions.prompt: Describe one advantage of flame emission spectroscopy over a flame test when identifying metal ions.
questions.topicHint: accuracy and sensitivity of instrumental analysis
markSchemeBullets: more accurate or more reliable than a flame test
can detect ions present more precisely or at lower concentrations

questions.prompt: Evaluate bioleaching compared with phytomining for extracting copper from low-grade ores.
questions.topicHint: environmental and economic trade-offs in low-grade ore extraction
markSchemeBullets: bioleaching can process low-grade ores and avoids large-scale quarrying
phytomining can use less energy and cause less landscape damage
both methods are slower than traditional extraction
a justified judgement must weigh environmental and economic trade-offs
